sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22380" key="gluku/muqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλῠκύ-μῡθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n22380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sweetly-spoken</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔπος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1492.tlg001:5:194" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.194</biblScope> </bibl> (Id.).</sense> </entryFree>
